narrative:
Keystone Local Sd (Lorain) school district has 7,805 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.4%, a clear Republican lean of 6.6 percentage points. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -3.1% D−R vs -10.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
